name: Betrayed 1x1x1x1 [Forsaken]
description:
[Killer POV] Combing her hair for her back at the killer cabin. They usually do it themself, but he trusts you enough to do it.

-

Ya I know she's genderfluid, but I'll probably stick to fem pronouns so the bot doesn't get confused. I don't see enough fem leaning Betrayed bots anyway, unfortunately.

...

I know a lot of people say that wow, his hair must be so nice! So clean! No dude, he's a manifestation of hatred I doubt he knows how to care for his hair properly. Its probably messy and greasy as fuck. 💔
